rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynter Rectory a secundo die
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription; claude-haiku incorrectly combined this line with the next and misread several words.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription; claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the first header.

rows.description: Imprimis reddit comput: de remanentib: in cista
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description and main amounts ('11 9 4'). Overrode the pence fraction to 0.5 based on visual verification of the 'ob' mark clearly visible after the '4'. Claude-haiku mis-segmented the page and mis-attributed this amount, and its description was incorrect.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription; claude-haiku mis-segmented the page and did not extract this as a separate entry with its amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription, which correctly identified both the description and amount. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Ivanear') and assigned incorrect amounts.

Claude-haiku's description ('Longwitnam') is a slightly better match to the image than gpt-5-mini's ('Longwitham'). Overrode amount to '20 0 0' based on visual verification, as both extractors had incorrect amounts for this line.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription as both description and amount ('30 0 0') match the image. Claude-haiku extracted an incorrect amount ('2 0 0').
Selected gpt-5-mini's pounds, shillings, and pence ('03 00 8'). Overrode fraction to 0.5 based on visual verification of the 'ob' mark after the '8'. Claude-haiku extracted incorrect pence ('0s 0d').
Selected claude-haiku's determination that there is no amount on this line, which is visually confirmed. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned an amount to this line.
Both extractors correctly identified no amount on this line. Used claude-haiku's description for 'Chacehill' which is slightly more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Chacchill'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription as both description and amount ('03 8 11') match the image. Claude-haiku extracted incorrect amounts ('0 3 0 0.5').
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription. Claude-haiku was disqualified due to an invalid pence value (15d). Visual verification confirms 'Tree quitrents' and '04 0 0'.

Both extractors had significant issues. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule (invalid pence). Gpt-5-mini had the correct description but an incorrect amount ('1 12 0'). Overrode amount based on visual verification of '02 15 7' from the image.

Both extractors had significant issues. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule (invalid pence) and had an incorrect description. Gpt-5-mini extracted an incorrect amount ('0 10 0'). Overrode amount based on visual verification of '03 8 11' from the image.

Both extractors had significant issues. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule (invalid pence). Gpt-5-mini extracted an incorrect amount ('0 15 0'). Overrode amount based on visual verification of '04 0 0' from the image.

Both extractors extracted incorrect amounts and/or descriptions for this row due to vertical misalignment. Overrode amount based on visual verification of '01 12 0' matching 'Mountague' from the image.
Both extractors extracted incorrect amounts or no amounts due to vertical misalignment. Overrode amount based on visual verification of '00 10 0' matching 'Hugheys' from the image.
Both extractors extracted incorrect amounts or were disqualified (claude-haiku for invalid pence). Overrode amount based on visual verification of '00 15 0' matching 'Greenesay' from the image.
Both extractors incorrectly assigned amounts to this line due to vertical misalignment. Overrode to no amount based on visual verification that there is no amount on the 'Walker' line.
Selected gpt-5-mini's determination that there is no amount on this line, which is visually confirmed. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule due to an invalid pence value (15d).
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription as it correctly extracted the description and amount (02 5 5q). Claude-haiku missed the amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription as it correctly extracted the description and amount (01 18 7). Claude-haiku missed the amount.

Selected gpt-5-mini's accurate interpretation of the bracketed description and its lack of a direct amount, correctly classified as a header. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with the first sub-entry and assigned an incorrect amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription. This is a sub-entry under the 'Tintinhull' header. Claude-haiku failed to segment this correctly.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription. This is a sub-entry under the 'Tintinhull' header. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule due to an invalid pence value (18d).
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription, which correctly identified both description and amount. Claude-haiku missed the amount and had a minor transcription error in the description.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription. Claude-haiku was disqualified by hard rule due to an invalid pence value (19d).

Both extractors extracted incorrect amounts or were disqualified (claude-haiku for invalid pence) due to vertical misalignment. Overrode amount based on visual verification of '06 9 7' matching 'Brewhouse' from the image.
Both extractors incorrectly assigned amounts to this line due to vertical misalignment. Overrode to no amount based on visual verification that there is no amount on the 'Trethewin' line.
Both extractors correctly identified that there is no amount on this line. Consensus reached.

Both extractors correctly identified the total amount. Used claude-haiku's more concise description 'Summa Arrearagiorum' as it aligns better with the visible text, omitting 'receptorum' which is not clearly present in the image.
